user.title: Amazon Orders
user.description: Configure IMAP access for Amazon order emails. initial_scan_days controls how far back the first scan should look when no previous scan timestamp exists. imap_folder is optional - leave blank for the root inbox, or provide a folder name to search a specific folder. Note that some email providers require 'INBOX/Folder name', others will accept simply 'Folder name'.

init.title: Amazon Order Options
init.description: Configure how Home Assistant tracks and processes Amazon order emails. delivered_retention_days controls how many days delivered orders are kept. update_interval controls how often HA checks for delivery updates. initial_scan_days controls how far back a first scan should look. imap_folder is optional and defaults to INBOX.

purge_order.name: Purge order
purge_order.description: Remove a specific order from tracking. The order will no longer appear in the Amazon Order Status sensors.

order_id.name: Order ID
order_id.description: The Amazon order number to remove (e.g. 123-4567890-1234567). You can copy this from the sensor's order list.

rescan.name: Rescan orders
rescan.description: Rescan Amazon order emails over a configurable lookback period.

days.name: Days
days.description: Number of days to scan back from now.
